title: miencrap 2 minerat
description: makes mineracft better by adding random bullshit (140+ blocks, 80+ mobs)
body:
![miencrap 2 minerat logo!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71747ea8ae9488fedb19bbf288f9910e0df4fa07.gif)

> !!! important
> 
> the resourcepack **does not work well with sodium**! and does not work with shaders at all
>
> when playing please turn on the music :3

# miencrap 2 minerat
**(please pretend there's a giant ad banner here)**

PLEASE DOWNLOAD THE RESOURCEPACK TOO (it's in the versions category, click on the latest version and scroll down)
also when **playing** *plesae* turn **on** the **music**

# THE MIENCRAP 2 MINERAT GUIDE IS COMING SOON

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/vFS19aWFdIw?si=X6x6J6KqmACkvdkf" title="YouTube vieo player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rANNuXOjyMI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/g-il_ZgR7WI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

original soundtrack: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=idbTrz5vh7Y&list=PLLlSf7H0YvII4hWRMnqM8Sp-PFdxTUwMA

totally changes the world of **minecraft** with no **mods**
![a forest with an extraction of petroleum happening on the right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae256eb2d9913906089837951ac85d475512a4bc_0.webp)
## what does it add????
adds >100 new **blocks**, >40 **new** mobs, 5 **boring** dimensions 

**and** more music

also completely changes all three **of** the existing dimensions

bonus: makes the difficulty just a little bit higher

![the backrooms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e64f4ea25d9c19c55c9bcb6cc5fad90adaa2db8f_0.webp)
## why would i want to download it??
because we worked at it for longer than a year 

![Room with computers and a villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49955035b9df4cdf8a4e2581d8120cc0d785d379.png)
## notes
1. contains mild profanity
2. you can cheat and give yourself custom items by using /loot give @s loot ...
3. you can also cheat and spawn custom mobs by using /function what:mob/_spawner/...
4. but don't cheat
5. uses [OBJMC](https://github.com/Godlander/objmc) for rendering custom entities and [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=u5NqO2v_xnY](this song).

![A forest on fire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38e3e3a21bf276055006df3448f7da27055a16bd_0.webp)
## asdajsiodjasodijasodiajsdoiasdpaodsad
adsjasoidasjdioasjofiajiocds

![A broken structure with Asgore who's driving in a car right after a beer, a worker of an american fast food restaurant chain we shall not mention, a giant gamign chair and a lot of minecarts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ca77b2621a0ae37b5ef27da7a04381320617e78_0.webp)

## how to play
1. download the datapack and the resource pack
2. enable the resource pack
3. add the datapack when creating a new world

   
please turn on the music

you also shall disable all~~~~ optimisation mods like optifine 
or just play on vanilla

![a steve and a fish that was dipped in chocolate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1828bd4045ad3fef81e15c86291fa8f9de2c0e15_0.webp)

available in english, russian and **LOLCAT**

made by tacocat820 and runrun5 

special thanks to steve jobs  

thanks to kalashn1k and Cactus1010 for making the oil structure and many of the other nether and blues structures

thanks to godlander for making objmc
